remarks: All referenced shader files, geometry systems, and validation modules confirmed present in the codebase.

REQUIRED_ATTRIBUTES duplication confirmed across all three geometry systems — note that particleField.ts omits the 'color' attribute (GPU-computed), so the registry must define per-system specs, not a single shared list. The plan already accounts for this with separate POINTCLOUD_ATTRIBUTES, PARTICLEFIELD_ATTRIBUTES, RIBBONFIELD_ATTRIBUTES.
Uniform count is ~20 (19 common + uOpacity fragment-only), consistent with plan's claim of 20.
Existing validateShaderCompilation and geometryValidator patterns in scene.ts provide a clean integration point for step 5.
Vitest test framework confirmed; test location tests/visual/ is correct.
shaderIntegrity.ts and shaderRegistry.ts do not yet exist — no conflicts.
Regex-based GLSL parsing is appropriate given the project's flat declaration style with no preprocessor directives.
